programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Air ambulances bring the emergency room to critically ill or injured people across the country, including a man in cardiac arrest and a woman trampled by a foal.

programme.title: Night Coppers
programme.desc: In the centre of Brighton, a lone officer is violently attacked and urgently needs back-up. And a disorientated drunk going home to bed tries smashing his way into the wrong house.

programme.title: Night Coppers
programme.desc: Brightons night police patrol the towns hectic night life - from a possible suicide up on the cliff, to an urgent manhunt for a violent assailant with a crowbar.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Car S.O.S
programme.desc: Tim and Fuzz are taking on a 1984 Opel Manta GTE owned by former amateur rally driver, Alan. Alans family hope that a fully restored car will help bring him out of his shell.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: The guys are on the trail of two vintage Harleys in Pennsylvania, but Frank gets more than he bargained for when one bike collector takes a liking to him.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Akili aims to enchant her guests with exotic elegance and a fusion of flavours. Can she deliver a prize-worthy party or will her ice cream leave her out in the cold?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The weeks final visit is to Jordan and Robins country pub in Somerset. But with one BandBer dreading the potential of stale ale smell, the hosts have their work cut out.

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: In Tuscany, Gill and Robin turn an old cantina into a rural hillside retreat. Stacey sets her sights on opening a yoga studio. David and Lanes relocation doesnt go to plan.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Its full steam ahead for train driver Wayne and train manager Kate, as Lee Juggurnauth shows them the best of what their £85k budget can get them in the town of Pinar de Campoverde, Spain.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Craig Rowe helps keen dancers Jane and James search for their dream holiday home on eastern Crete: a holidaymakers paradise full of stunning beaches with crystal-clear waters, archaeological sites and picturesque villages and towns.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: First to host in Liverpool is barber Kenny Flynn. Young at heart and always in search of a laugh, this 29 year old is hoping his `Big Kids party theme will prove a winner with his fellow guests.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Liverpool, second to host is businessman Rob Spicer, who is confident that his historical leader theme will be a bit hit. His distinguished guests for the night are `Jesus, `Fidel Castro, `the Queen and `Naomi Campbell.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Third to host in Liverpool is Nigerian super model and barrister Cynthia Umezulike, who treats her guests to some tribal fish, a traditional Jeloff and an exotic fruit platter.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Liverpool its the turn of hairy rocker Glen Simpson to host. Glen is serving sticky blackened pork and an Elvis-inspired dessert of deep fat fried chocolate bars with homemade peanut butter and banana ice cream.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Its the fifth day in Liverpool and the turn of Jilly Pollock, who hopes to bag the prize with her black tie evening with a menu featuring Jillys figs, Jillys hot beef, and Jillys berry delight.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Tony and Hendrik hunt for their dream holiday home on Portugals Setúbal Peninsula for £330k. Can Danni Menzies find the perfect one for all their family to enjoy?

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil catch up with two couples who had high expectations and long wish lists. Amy and Takie were desperate to get off the rental merry-go-round and buy their first home in London. Meanwhile, in Wiltshire Vicky and Andy were trying to combine their search for a home and two businesses on a budget of £400,000, which the couple eventually reconsidered once the reality of the market became clear.

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer are in Mapperley with Sue and Richard, who agree their home is no longer fit for purpose but cant decide whether to stay or move on.

programme.title: Batch from Scratch: Cooking for Less
programme.desc: For the Burton family, meal planning is a minefield and mum Becky is feeling the strain. Can Joe and Suzanne transform chaotic cooking into delightful dinners?

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody
programme.desc: Delve into the inside story of the murder of a 74-year-old woman and the macabre lengths the killer went to in attempting to conceal her death. Annette Smiths lodger reports that she has been missing for several weeks.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Police Custody
programme.desc: The suspect admits to the murder of a 74-year-old woman. But a deeply disturbing tale that shocks experienced detectives has only just begun. The police continue to probe the suspect and the interview becomes more and more chilling.

programme.title: Fukushima: Days That Shocked the World
programme.desc: In March 2011, Japan was hit by a devastating tsunami killing 20,000 and triggering a nuclear meltdown. Survivors and witnesses tell their extraordinary stories.

programme.title: Fukushima: Days That Shocked the World
programme.desc: In March 2011, a massive tsunami caused a major meltdown at Japans Fukushima nuclear plant, triggering explosions and evacuations. What went wrong at Fukushima?

programme.title: Super Surgeons: A Chance at Life
programme.desc: Ex-navy pilot Rich has a massive 16cm tumour running from his jaw to his heart. Meanwhile, nearly all the organs in Tracys pelvis need removal to combat her stage 4 bowel cancer.

programme.title: Lake District Rescue
programme.desc: The team are called out to a man whos broken his leg on Scafell Pike. With darkness closing in, leaving him in plummeting temperatures could be life-threatening.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Dog handler Darren calls on all his powers of persuasions to try and end a roof-top stand-off. Spike breaks out a drug wipe for a teenage tearaway on two wheels, while Steve is forced to use his pepper spray when a suspect refuses to come quietly.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Chris and the team are in pursuit of a stolen Mazda M3, and the driver disappears into an industrial area. Chris tracker dog Ronny has a twitchy nose and they hope this canine crime fighter will manage to track down the villain.

programme.title: Johnny Guitar
programme.desc: A brooding psychological drama where the female of the species is deadlier than the male. Vienna is a saloon owner whose plans to build a railway station anger the locals. They face Emma Small, who leads the town gang with her lover and gunslinger, the Dancin Kid.

programme.title: Traffic Cops

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The interceptors make an early hour dash to catch a team of late night burglars and one of the suspects treats Liam to a face full of saliva. Jacko and Simon are in pursuit of a speeding driver who abandons the car and legs it.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: For the first time, a pursuit is filmed from the suspects perspective. Plus Liam and sniffer dog Louis help uncover thousands in cash and a £1/2 million of class-A drugs. Finally, a 999 call causes firearms officers to rush to Guisborough at 11pm.

programme.title: Motorway Cops: Catching Britains Speeders
programme.desc: Featuring a dangerous high-speed chase through Newcastle city centre, and a serious crash between a car and a cyclist with some uncertainty about who was at fault.

programme.title: Police: Night Shift 999
programme.desc: The night begins with police officers are called to a fight in a takeaway and other officers respond to a hit-and-run call. There are reports of bouncers being racially abused by a passerby. Police receive a report of a man with a machete.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A woman makes a desperate attempt to frame her friend right in front of deputies; a drivers assortment of containers raises some questions; a man in possession of a stolen truck insists that his friend is the one at fault.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Fleeing suspects risk their safety by hiding in a dangerous swamp; for one driver, a broken truck turns out to be the start of a very long list of problems; deputies sympathise with a woman whos been put through the wringer.

programme.title: Banged up Abroad
programme.desc: American David and his German friend Tom smuggle drugs from Afghanistan to Germany, but they are intercepted at the Turkish-Greek border. They have to serve their sentence in a Greek prison.

programme.title: Mud Mountain Haulers
programme.desc: Craig Lebeau and his team are pushed to the limit when their main driver gets stuck in a serious accident with a fully loaded truck. They wonder if the money is worth the risks.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Tempers fray at a Perth freight depot; husband and wife trucking team Mark and Clare Bolitho bring their 16 year old dog Roy along.

programme.title: Trucking Hell

programme.title: Trucking Hell
programme.desc: A 46-tonne artic has veered into a verge on a busy A-road and is going nowhere without some help. And a lorry gets caught in slippery mud.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: PC Ange Salous confronts a not-so-happy chappy, and a torrential downpour hampers police at a major crash scene on the M1.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The interceptors embark on a spooky pursuit as their search for an armed drink-driver leads them through a graveyard. programme.title: Police Interceptors

programme.desc: We catch up with Jojo, a familiar and friendly face from previous series. We join her on a tour of her new home, and follow her latest venture - a shoe shop that she runs from her garage!

programme.title: Shoplifters: At War With The Law
programme.desc: A man is behaving suspiciously and may have a weapon. Security guards Mark and Keiths number-one priority is to keep the public safe, so they put their lives on the line to corner him.

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: Cops are on the hunt for stolen cars, and a traffic cop ends up on a 100-mile chase down the M1. Officers pursue a stolen car being driven by a wanted prolific criminal, police in Yorkshire spot a stolen van.

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: During a busy spring bank holiday, the traffic cops deal with the effects of drink and drugs. A dangerous drunk driver leads traffic cops on a 20-minute chase through busy areas; a drunk driver dangerously weaves down a busy dual carriageway.

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: In central Derbyshire, the Traffic Cops are on the hunt for a car linked to the theft of two motorbikes. After a 10-minute search, officers spot the car.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: There is a hair-raising pursuit through the market town of Ripley which sees a driver mounting pavements, hitting cars and even colliding with an ambulance. An Interceptor has a narrow escape when an out of control driver crashes into his car. A drunk driver goes for the world record in failed breathalyser tests and the helicopter is called in when a Land Rover driver decides to take a pursuit off-road.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The Eurocopter gets down and dirty in a lengthy manhunt, a vanload of villains lose control in a high speed pursuit and a drunk driver crushes his Corsa like it is a tin can. Elsewhere, a speed freak thinks he can outrun the law, there is aggravation and abuse on Derbyshires mean streets and the interceptors facing off against an eight legged enemy.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A horsebox carries an illegal load, one of the teams top cars becomes a victim of a drink-driver and a road user gets a lesson in how to transport children safely.

programme.title: Rogue Claimers
programme.desc: A football fan is caught offside with a bogus stolen luggage claim. A dog owner is caught attempting to take a policy out on a puppy after its been injured.

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Mackenzie and Levi are counting down the days until Macs pregnancy has hit the 12-week threshold - and they can finally spread the word of their pregnancy.

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Lacey and David are headed out of the hospital, unpacking Jo ending her engagement when Lacey bumps into Holden - a survivor from the train crash.

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: Nurse Ennis changes the dressings on Antonias finger, following a nasty accident with a coffee grinder.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: Sister Harriet spots Terry waiting in the queue and decides he needs urgent care. Hes fallen off a roof and is unable to move his arm from a position above his head, "which immediately rings alarm bells", declares Sister Harriet.

programme.title: AandE After Dark
programme.desc: Lifting the lid on the night shift as experienced by AandE workers, with exclusive access to Hull Royal Infirmary. The night-time challenges facing NHS staff are captured in their raw form.

programme.title: Ambulance: Code Red
programme.desc: Patients in need of emergency assistance include a man in cardiac arrest at a karate club, a 83-year-old woman with a suspected broken thigh, and a truck driver trapped in his cabin.

programme.title: Skin AandE

programme.title: Call the Bailiffs: Time To Pay Up
programme.desc: Agents Sam and Mark enforce a debt of nearly £5000 in unpaid legal fees. In Sussex, Alex seeks to recover a £700 debt from a garage. In London, Vlad has a writ to recover nearly £35,000 in unpaid rent. Agent Lewis is on the hunt for a debtor.

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: After letting a young couple stay in her house for free, young mum Hamdi ended up locked out of her own home. Nick discovered that his tenant had scarpered and sublet his house to half a dozen strangers.

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: Elderly patient Elizabeth is suffering with persistent bleeding, a potential sign of cancer.

programme.title: Skin AandE

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Revisiting the victims and villains of the rental market. Rachel rented out her cottage for three months; four years later, her tenant is still there.

programme.desc: Steve Irwins son Robert is following in his footsteps. After months of training, its time for Robert to solo feed the most notorious croc at the Australia Zoo.

programme.title: Pit Bulls and Parolees
programme.desc: After a dog is shot, Tia races to save his life. Then, Matt and Lizzy scramble to rescue a scared and sick puppy running loose on the busy roads near the warehouse.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell
programme.desc: Can Jackson Galaxy help the family of a once-cuddly kitten who has matured into a demonic feline? Plus, one couples rescue cat resents the arrival of a new kitten.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell
programme.desc: A woman and her friend share custody of a yowling, troublesome feline, plus one couple wants to start a family, but are worried about their cats aggressive behaviour.

programme.title: Lone Star Law
programme.desc: Its dove season in Texas, the start of hunting season. In Beaumont, road hunters get an early start on deer season during a decoy sting.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff and his team of 30 experts preside over one of the busiest animal clinics in the U.S.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: Pete joins renowned builders Christopher Richter and Andreas Wenning on an adventure in Germany.

programme.title: 100 Days Wild
programme.desc: A disastrous fish haul threatens the colonys food supply; pushing to build a second outpost, Adam sets off down river alone, but his canoe capsizes, and hes put at risk for hypothermia; tensions between Oliver and the group reach a boiling point.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier
programme.desc: Autumn arrives and the Kilchers scramble to finish their winter preparations in time. Meanwhile, Eivin uses a samurai sword to prepare Thanksgiving dinner.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People
programme.desc: A medical emergency on the Wolfpacks ranch forces them to be more resourceful. And, Gabes family are concerned when he makes a hasty leap towards marriage.

programme.title: Mountain Monsters
programme.sub-title: The Silver Giant of Boone County
programme.desc: AIMS looks for a big bear-like creature known as the Silver Giant and build their largest trap ever. Plus, they learn about other beasts there too.

programme.title: Crikey! Its the Irwins
programme.desc: Steve Irwins son Robert is following in his footsteps. After months of training, its time for Robert to solo feed the most notorious croc at the Australia Zoo.

programme.title: Richard E. Grants 7 Deadly Sins
programme.desc: Richard E Grant explores the evolutionary roots of Wrath. Like humans, animals also experience a rush of blood to the head, fuelled by a cocktail of hormones.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: Pete joins renowned builders Christopher Richter and Andreas Wenning on an adventure in Germany.

programme.title: Animal Cops Houston
programme.desc: Investigator Debbie answers a call when an emaciated mare gives birth to a premature foal. The foal is so sick, Dr Thurston takes it home to bottle-feed it.

programme.title: Naya Din Nayi Raat
programme.desc: Sushma, a young girl, runs away from home to escape an arranged marriage. On her way, she meets many people, each representing a distinct facet of human nature, who help her in her difficulties.

programme.title: Johny I Love You
programme.desc: After the death of his wife, former bandit Suraj Singh decides to turn his life around and goes to work in a small hillside community. He takes his son, whom he renames Johny for fear that his old partner will come and search for him - an event which occurs in a most surprising manner.

programme.title: Samay: When Time Strikes

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch agonizes over the near-drowning of a boy who lies in a coma.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitchs upcoming birthday motivates him to enter an iron-man competition; Matts effectiveness as a lifeguard suffers when he takes a night job.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: A murderer threatening to bring harm to some of the lifeguards; Mitch resorts to extraordinary means to bring an end to the situation peacefully.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch and the Baywatch lifeguards are asked by gymnast Mary Lou Retton to help organize an athletic competition for developmentally challenged youths.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Matt is asked for help by a former love, motorcycle racer Jesse Majors, when her bosss romantic interest in her becomes obsessive.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: The reunion of an elite group of lifeguards from the 1950s prompts Ben to make a decision about his future at Baywatch.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch tries to save his brother, who suffers a heart attack after their sailboat capsizes; Summer sees a ghost while staying at a famous San Diego hotel.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Stephanie and C.J. search for Mitch and his brother, who are lost at sea; Summer does some research on the ghost that has been appearing to her.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: An attractive woman and her plain sister vie for Mitchs affections; Matt confronts his fear of sharks.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch dates an investigative reporter whose story about an international government conspiracy has put her life in danger.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: The lifeguards help country music star Jessie Lee Harris (guest star Ricky Van Shelton) locate his estranged wife and son (guest stars Kassie Wesley, Brady Bluhm). Martina McBride also guest stars.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: As Mitch deals with budget cuts that could take lifeguards off the beach, Matt and Summer save a young couple from drowning.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: For Stephanie and Matt (Alexandra Paul, David Charvet), a week with the Coast Guard leads to a run-in with arms smugglers.

programme.desc: Matt (David Charvet) becomes involved in a youthful con artists scam; Stephanies (Alexandra Paul) feelings for Scott (Phillip Troy) deepen.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: When a Hollywood producer decides to create a TV series about lifeguards, he wreaks havoc with the Baywatch crew.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: A massive earthquake strands a diver, collapses C.J.s apartment, traps Hobie in a garage and leaves Jackies trailer dangling from a cliff.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch (David Hasselhoff) and his crew race against time to save Hobie (Jeremy Jackson), Jackie (Susan Anton) and others trapped by an earthquake.

programme.title: Baywatch

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Working together for 24 hours, Mitch and Stephanie rediscover their personal relationship; Hobie has a party.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Matt befriends a young boy who is ashamed of his fathers dwarfism; Carolines infatuation with Logan causes her to miss a rescue.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch is annoyed by an arrogant FBI agent who is working undercover as a lifeguard in order to monitor a crime bosss girlfriend.

programme.desc: The Santa Ana winds blow some unusual patrons onto the beach, including the boyfriend of a woman Mitch rescued years ago, and an amorous older couple.

programme.title: Baywatch

programme.title: Canals: The Making of a Nation
programme.desc: Liz McIvor recounts the story of `canal mania, the period of activity that helped develop Britains modern financial economy, now centred in London.

programme.title: Canal Walks with Julia Bradbury
programme.desc: Julia Bradbury travels along the countrys network of canals and their accompanying towpath trails. Julia kicks off her tour with a visit to the Scottish Highlands. Against the backdrop of Ben Nevis, her walk starts near Fort William where she embarks on her eight-mile trip along the Caledonian Canal, which cuts through beautiful mountain country.

programme.title: The Normans
programme.desc: Professor Robert Bartlett explores how the Normans developed from a band of marauding Vikings into the formidable warriors who conquered England in 1066. He tells how the Normans established their new province of Normandy - `land of the northmen - in northern France. They went on to build some of the finest churches in Europe and turned into an unstoppable force of Christian knights and warriors.

programme.title: Misery
programme.desc: A romance novelist who survives a terrible car crash in snowy Colorado is rescued by a deranged former nurse, whos obsessed by his novels. Confined to bed and cut off from the outside world, the writer slowly becomes aware that he is more prisoner than patient.

programme.title: Mark Lawson Talks to...
programme.desc: Horror writer Stephen King talks to Mark Lawson about his life and work.

programme.title: Light and Dark
programme.desc: Professor Jim Al-Khalili shows how scientists have used light to reveal almost everything we know about the universe.

programme.title: Romancing the Stone: The Golden Ages of British Sculpture
programme.desc: At the turn of the 20th century young sculptors began to be influenced by the `primitive works of Africa and the Pacific islands, which saw an artistic revolution spearheaded by Eric Gill and Jacob Epstein that would climax in the anti-sculptural gestures of Gilbert and George and Damien Hirst.

programme.desc: Join Gethin Jones, Helen Skelton, Michelle Ackerley and the team for conversation, advice and tips to make your day that little bit easier.

programme.title: Crimewatch Live
programme.desc: A heartfelt plea to find those who shot 16-year-old Amaan Shakoor in London in 2018. And how police caught the killer of an army veteran who was dumped in a disused building in Scotland.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A former pub in Stockport, a terraced house in Mansfield Woodhouse and a property housing three self-contained flats in Crewe are all sold under the hammer. All three owners come up against unexpected issues.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: On the Devon coast, presenter Caroline Hawley is collecting seaweed as she remembers a bygone pastime. She learns that Victorian women were discouraged from studying botany, so they gathered seaweed specimens to take home, press and dry. A few of these amateur naturalists even discovered new species, which were named after them. Over in Exeter, two teams dash around a huge indoor antiques fair in the company of their experts, Kate Bliss and Ben Cooper.

programme.title: RuPauls Drag Race UK vs the World
programme.desc: The fierce Drag Race UK spin-off continues as our international queens fight to impress Mama Ru and do their countries proud. Award-winning comedian Jayde Adams is on hand to help as for one night only the queens form comedy double acts for RuPauls Fringe Festival. But who will have the last laugh? Amandaland star Lucy Punch joins RuPaul on the judging panel alongside Michelle Visage and Graham Norton as another queen sashays away.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A former pub in Stockport, a terraced house in Mansfield Woodhouse and a property housing three self-contained flats in Crewe are all sold under the hammer. All three owners come up against unexpected issues.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: On the Devon coast, presenter Caroline Hawley is collecting seaweed as she remembers a bygone pastime. She learns that Victorian women were discouraged from studying botany, so they gathered seaweed specimens to take home, press and dry. A few of these amateur naturalists even discovered new species, which were named after them. Over in Exeter, two teams dash around a huge indoor antiques fair in the company of their experts, Kate Bliss and Ben Cooper.

The Skye Bridge opened in 1995 and has seen tourist numbers to the island double. Hoping to explore Skyes spiritual heritage, he wants to know what endures today in the face of so many visitors.

A clever camera brings him right up close to a tiny but mighty spider, while sheer sweat and persistence pay off as the team track down one of the most elusive and deadly reptiles in the dunes.

programme.title: Deadly 60
programme.desc: Steve is hot on the trail of Africas big cats. He dons a camouflage suit to beat a leopard at its own game by hunting his crew, but it proves to be a lot harder than it looks. Nevertheless a once-in-a-lifetime experience gets him closer to a wild leopard than even hed dare hope. After an eerie night sleeping out under the stars, Steve catches up with a pride of lions and witnesses them hunting right before his eyes.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May confront the credit crunch head on as they attempt to find three sensibly priced small cars that wont make you miserable, a process that involves haranguing bankers, harnessing large dogs, and almost getting arrested. Plus, James meets American stunt driving legend Ken Block, and Michael McIntyre is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car.

programme.title: Louis Theroux

programme.title: Green Book
programme.desc: Dr Don Shirley is a world-class African-American pianist, who is about to embark on a concert tour in the Deep South in 1962. In need of a driver and protection, Shirley recruits Tony Lip, a tough-talking bouncer from an Italian-American neighbourhood in the Bronx. Despite their differences, the two men soon develop an unexpected bond while confronting racism and danger in an era of segregation.

programme.title: Villages by the Sea
programme.desc: Archaeologist Ben Robinson visits the Norfolk village of Cley next the Sea and discovers that due to Dutch settlers in the Elizabethan era, its not as next the sea as it once was. Ben finds a village green that was once a thriving port with big ships and surrounded by a thriving village. He visits the church and meets Matt Champion, an expert in medieval graffiti who has found some incredible links to past villagers.

programme.title: Italys Invisible Cities
programme.desc: Using the latest 3D scanning technology, Alexander Armstrong and Dr Michael Scott uncover 2500 years of hidden history in Naples from its earliest Greek and Roman origins. They explore how the volcano of Mount Vesuvius both nurtured the region and exacted a terrible price on the local population. Plus, they delve into a labyrinth of fascinating underground spaces that helped build and sustain the city.

programme.title: Flog It!
programme.desc: Paul Martin is joined by experts Kate Bateman and Adam Partridge as they explore the collectables at a valuation day in the spa town of Malvern. Adam gets in a spin over a wooden top that reminds him of his childhood, and Kate hopes shes struck gold with some coins that could be worth thousands of pounds. Paul takes a break from the antiques and tries his hand at some woodwork - meeting a local man whos been making violins for over 40 years.

programme.title: Villages by the Sea
programme.desc: Archaeologist Ben Robinson uncovers the secrets of Cornwalls Tintagel, famed as the legendary birthplace of King Arthur. Ben discovers Tintagel was potentially more important than London a thousand years ago, based on recent evidence unearthed at an archaeological dig overseen by English Heritage. It was found that over 2,000 people were living here which, at the time, which would have made it the largest settlement anywhere of its kind in Britain.

programme.title: Italys Invisible Cities
programme.desc: With the help of 3D scanning technology, Alexander Armstrong and Dr Michael Scott explore the watery wonderland of Venice. They uncover how a city built in a swamp became one of the most powerful in Medieval Europe, and dive into its canals to experience how the city remains standing.

programme.title: Flog It!
programme.desc: Paul Martin and antiques experts Michael Baggott and Kate Bateman visit Dulwich College in London. Michael falls in love with a Chinese censor, Kate is enamoured by a charming collection of bronze animals and Paul makes the short journey to Dulwich Picture Gallery, where he is privileged to see one of the best collections of European old masters in the world.

programme.title: Horrible Histories

programme.title: Go Get Arty
programme.desc: The Kwapongs make a bug jungle, Chris Howarth makes sand art waves, and Rob Biddulph shows how to draw a furry monster!

programme.title: After Life: Rot Box Detectives
programme.desc: A team of young science detectives investigate rot and decay through a series of experiments and activities, assisted by Dr George McGavin.

programme.title: Horrible Histories
programme.desc: A special episode of the historical sketch show, taking a look at some of literatures greatest works and historys wackiest writers. Along the way we see the development of storytelling technology. We learn how a party at Lord Byrons house led to the writing of the Gothic masterpiece Frankenstein, and how Charles Dickens was the Harry Styles of his day.

programme.title: BBC Live Lessons
programme.desc: All aboard for this Live Lesson on World Book Day! Join presenters Joel M and Vick Hope as they reveal how books can be all-access travel passes that take you to many different places and spark lots of different feelings. Celebrate with us as we discover our unique reading vibes by exploring when, where and how we like to read, as well as thinking about how we want books to make us feel. Well be packing our bags full of brilliant ideas and hearing from some amazing authors as we travel.

programme.title: Absolute Genius With Dick and Dom
programme.desc: Dick and Dom reveal the genius of artist and inventor Leonardo Da Vinci and are inspired to come up with their own genius idea. The duo bring one of Da Vincis boldest inventions to life, involving a tank, a medieval army and some rotten tomatoes.

programme.title: Shark Bites
programme.desc: Steve Backshall meets a super-speedy shark. Reaching speeds of 50kph, the mako is the fastest shark in the sea. Steve snorkels with marko sharks off the coast of San Diego in California before getting under their skin in his shark lab.

programme.title: Andy And The Band

programme.desc: Nitro plays hilarious pranks on his fellow Gladiators, and join behind-the-scenes fun from Sheffield Arena with challenges and sneaky pranking on the audience.

programme.title: Bluey

programme.desc: Duggee has made a time machine to show the Squirrels famous periods in time.

programme.title: The Game Catchers

programme.title: Timmy Time
programme.desc: Harriet shows the class how to make cookies and Timmy decides to make one bigger than all the other cookies put together. He then decorates it as a football, and spends the day trying to protect it.

programme.title: Our Family
programme.desc: Freddie and Mum paint colourful dinosaur eggs and organise a tricky treasure hunt for brother George. Will George use his dino knowledge to find all of the hidden eggs and dinosaurs?

programme.title: My World Kitchen
programme.desc: Lolas family are from Spain, a country in southern Europe. She is making a traditional Spanish dish called empanadas for her friends, with a fish and vegetable filling and a side of Spanish dancing!

programme.title: Ferne and Rorys Teeny Tiny Creatures
programme.desc: Ezra discovers lots of interesting facts about crabs. Rory and his son Sandy take a trip to the seaside to look in rock pools for crabs. Ferne meets a crab with no shell of its own at the aquarium.

programme.title: Dog Squad
programme.desc: Therapy dog Toffee and his owner, Helen, are on a mission to help their new neighbours Kayla the vet and her daughter Tilly on moving-in day.

programme.title: Go Wild

programme.desc: Aneeshwar and Lizzie meet some tuataras and a burrowing owl.

programme.title: Biff and Chip
programme.desc: The imaginative adventures of the twins Biff and Chip, their brother Kipper and their family and friends.

programme.title: Puffin Rock
programme.desc: Oona makes her first night-time trip to the sea - all on her own!

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: A nice and fun song that is all about the joys and magic of reading.

programme.title: Yukee
programme.desc: Yukees bouncing ball sets off a musical chain of events without anyone saying a word!

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels are out doing a bit of sailing. What fun! When Tag starts to feel a little bit seasick Duggee suggests a stop off at the Island for a spot of lunch, but wheres all the food?

programme.title: Yakka Dee
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say book and go on a whirlwind word adventure. See lots of different books and explore how they look and feel and see a flip book, a flap book and make a scrapbook.

programme.title: Numberblocks
programme.desc: The Numberblobs are gathered for a star-studded evening with the family of Fives All-star Line-up. In the first half of the show, the Numberblobs watch performances from Numberblocks Five, Ten, Fifteen, Twenty and Twenty-Five. But where are the rest of the Five Times Table friends?

programme.title: Alphablocks
programme.desc: OO and friends discover a talking book and some missing words and a pile of letters. Can they put the story of Little Red Riding Hood back together?

programme.title: Something Special: Were All Friends
programme.desc: Justin and his friend go to the library and finish their day with a treat in the library cafe. Meanwhile, Mr Tumble uses his imagination by playing library with the toys.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: In Tummy Tales, a boy learns to knit with purple wool and in Teletubbyland, purple Tinky Winky answers the Tubby Phone and leads the Tubby Phone Dance. Tinky Winky also plays with the Tiddlytubbies.

programme.title: Patchwork Pals
programme.desc: Patchwork Tarsier has a problem: he wants someone to sing him a lullaby, but the Patchwork Pals keep on running away as soon as he comes by! How will he ever fall asleep like this?

programme.title: Raa Raa the Noisy Lion
programme.desc: Topsy is going to read Zebby a naptime story. Raa Raa wants to make the noises to go with the story, but they are all too loud and poor Zebby cant get to sleep. Can Raa Raa find any quiet sleepy noises in the Jingly Jangly Jungle?

programme.title: Chuggington
programme.desc: Koko becomes incredibly strong after she gets an upgrade to her hydraulic power booster.

programme.title: Gigglebiz

programme.title: Maddies Do You Know?
programme.desc: In todays episode, Maddie find out about books! First, she visits a library to learn how all the different types of books are stored in different sections. Then she uses her special cameras to show how the librarian helps us find a book in the library. We see how the books are sorted so that they all go back in the right place. Next, Maddie goes to a factory where books are made. She finds out how books start out as a big sheet of blank paper. Maddie shows us how this paper is printed with ink.

programme.title: The Game Catchers
programme.desc: The Game Catchers are five friends who travel through space exploring fantastic planets with one big mission: to discover, play and collect all the games in the universe.

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.desc: Only Peso can save the day when a cone snail invades the Octopod and picks off the crew one by one with its dangerous harpoons.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit

programme.desc: When Lilys father decides to move the family out of the Lake District, Peter comes up with a clever but dangerous plan to change Dr Bobtails mind.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: When the Squirrels cant figure out if fish have noses, Duggee shows them his library. But when the Squirrels realise no-one is visiting it, they have an idea. A mobile library. The Squirrels set off with Duggee. Along the way, they help Tino find his creativity, King Tiger figure out his favourite ice cream flavour and Worm find her love of fantasy. The Squirrels learn just how helpful and informative a library can be.

programme.desc: In Mexico, Frasier falls for a stunning model who insists he keep their romance a secret.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: As Martins 65th birthday approaches, Frasier and Niles attempt to outdo each other with their gifts for their father.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: At a library benefit Halloween costume party, Niles arrives at conclusions about Frasier and Daphne.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: A costume shop in upstate New York where owner Nicky and her husband have amassed an entire barn full of stuff. Later, Mike climbs over a wall of chairs to uncover a stash of Art Deco cigarette machines.

programme.title: Channel 4 News Summary
programme.desc: Channel 4s midday news summary.

programme.title: Car S.O.S
programme.desc: Tim and Fuzz take on carpenter Mikes 1980 Ford Escort RS2000. After his sons road accident, Mikes family want to repay his selfless devotion and give him the Car SOS treatment.

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole, Simon OBrien and Max McMurdo travel across the UK to find unique items lost in peoples homes to fix up for a profit. This episode features a sidecar.

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with Neil Delamere in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against vowels, consonants and numbers.

programme.title: Crufts 2026
programme.desc: Claudia Winkleman and Clare Balding present live coverage of Crufts 2026 from Birmingham. The Flyball gets off to a flying start. With Radzi Chinyanganya and Ellie Simmonds.

programme.title: A New Life in the Sun
programme.desc: In France, renovations give Andrew and Richard sleepless nights. In Spain, things get a little too quiet for Abi and Darren, and Gordon and Shonas dream hangs in the balance.

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The weeks final visit is to Helen and Carls self-catering glampsite, Peacock Lake, in Nottinghamshire. The hosts feedback has ruffled plenty of feathers throughout the week, so their guests expectations are sky-high.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Fourth to host in South Wales is doctor Sophie, whos usually vegan, but is serving meat to try and win her guests over. Will it be just what the doctor ordered?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Lucy Alexander helps Tracy and Lee find a French holiday home in Lower Normandy, which they hope could one day become their permanent home, for their budget of £70k.

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Includes sport and weather.

programme.title: Crufts 2026
programme.desc: Clare Balding presents and Claudia Winkleman reports as Crufts gathers pace with the judging of the Working and Pastoral Groups. Plus: athleticism and speed in the Agility and Flyball.

programme.title: Molly vs The Machines
programme.desc: From a teens suburban bedroom to the heart of Silicon Valley, the story of a heartbroken fathers bid for the truth behind his daughters death, caught-up in a powerful algorithmic spiral.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britains sharpest armchair critics share more of their sharp, insightful, passionate and sometimes emotional critiques of the weeks biggest and best shows on television.

programme.title: Lake District Rescue
programme.desc: The team are called out to a man whos broken his leg on Scafell Pike. With darkness closing in, leaving him in plummeting temperatures could be life-threatening.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay heads to Maxs Bar and Grill to help the restaurant before the divorced owners business crumbles.

programme.desc: A widowed New York socialite and her aimless son move to Paris after she spends the last of her husbands inheritance.

programme.desc: After her marriage in renowned wealthy family, Damini happens to see a cruel act done by her brother-in-law.

programme.title: Annadata

programme.title: Trishul
programme.desc: When Rajs mother refuses to allow her son to marry Shanti, he obeys her wishes, and leaves her in spite of her pregnancy. Years later, Shantis son Vijay returns to his fathers family to avenge his mother.

programme.title: Paathshaala
programme.desc: Trials and tribulations faced by children in schools are brought to light.

programme.title: Angrezi Medium

programme.title: Main Hoon Na
programme.desc: Major Ram is assigned with two missions, one is to protect a fragile peace initiative with Pakistan called Project Milap, and the other is to protect the daughter of General Bakshi, the commander in charge of Project Milap. The project takes him to St. Pauls College in Darjeeling, where he must go undercover as a student. As a mature student, Major Ram becomes a misfit with the hip college students.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Without the Ski Trip
programme.desc: Ross and Rachel have been fighting for the groups attention since the break up. Rachel invites everyone except Ross to her family cabin in the mountains, but on the way to the cabin, they run out of petrol. Everyone wants to call Ross for help, but Rachel wont let them.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Hypnosis Tape
programme.desc: Phoebe is upset when her 18-year-old half-brother, Frank Jr, wants to marry his attractive home economics teacher, who is more than 25 years older than him. Elsewhere, Monica receives a tip from an admirer worth a small fortune, and a hypnosis tape intended to assist Chandler give up smoking has a rather strange effect on him.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Tiny T-Shirt
programme.desc: Rachels former colleague Mark asks her out on a date. When Rachel invites Ross to her apartment, he thinks she wants to get back together, but she just wants to return his things. Later, as Rachel and Mark return from their date, Ross spies on them through the peephole of Joey and Chandlers door. Meanwhile, Monica dates a millionaire, and Joey is cast in a play and clashes with the female lead.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica inherits a beautiful dollhouse that is too elaborate to play with, so Phoebe makes her own, but it meets a sad end. Meanwhile, Joey thinks hes found his true love, and Rachels boss dates Chandler, placing her in a dangerous situation.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With a Chick and a Duck
programme.desc: When Monicas millionaire friend Pete buys a restaurant and asks Monica to be the head chef, she is faced with a difficult decision. Meanwhile, Ross makes a sacrifice for Rachel, and Joey buys Chandler an unusual pet.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The friends go to the opening night of one of Joeys plays. When Rachel finds out that Ross is bringing a date, she finds one of her own. Ross tries to convince Rachel that her date is mentally unbalanced. Meanwhile, Joeys play gets terrible reviews, but his co-star provides some comfort.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross develops a skin growth that doctors cant identify.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Ultimate Fighting Champion
programme.desc: Monica finds herself dating a guy who wants to be the Ultimate Fighting Champion. Meanwhile, Chandler finds his male bosss attentions just a little too friendly, and the group overhear a scandalous conversation at Central Perk.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe invites everyone to stay at her massage clients beach house for the weekend. Phoebe meets someone who knows details about her family, Rachel expresses her jealousy of Ross uninhibited girlfriend, and Joey nags the friends into agreeing to play a party game that requires the participants to gradually take off items of clothing.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross is dating Rachel again but hates what he had to do to get back together, while Phoebe and her real mother, Phoebe Snr, get to know each other better. Meanwhile, Monica is badly stung by a jellyfish and has to resort to drastic measures to relieve the pain.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler and Joey lose all their furniture, Monica finds that one date with her high-school heartthrob is more than enough, and Ross plays tricks on Rachel following their break-up. Elsewhere, Phoebe is temporarily convinced that a cat is the reincarnation of her dead adoptive mother Lily.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler has a brief fling with Rachels boss Joanna which leaves him handcuffed without his trousers in her office. Meanwhile, Joey can only afford one book in an encyclopaedia set, and Monica caters a party for her mother.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Ballroom Dancing
programme.desc: Joey argues with the building superintendent Treegar and ends up having to help him practise ballroom dancing. Meanwhile, Ross and Chandler cant get out of their gym membership even though neither of them wants to exercise, and Phoebe loses her massage job for kissing a client.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With Joeys New Girlfriend
programme.desc: Chandler falls for Joeys new date, Ross discovers that the woman that he thinks hes dating actually thinks hes the babysitter, Rachels new college boyfriend steals, and Phoebe tries to re-catch a cold to improve her singing voice.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Dirty Girl
programme.desc: Phoebe and Monica decide to go into business together after they cater a funeral where the widow tries not to pay, and Ross date with the beautiful Cheryl goes awry when he kills a rat in her filthy apartment.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Chandler Crosses the Line
programme.desc: Chandler finally confesses to his feelings for Kathy just after she splits up with Joey, Ross rediscovers his hopeless musical skills on the keyboard which Phoebe alone appreciates, and Chandler buys new furniture for the apartment since the robbery left them with just the canoe, chick and duck.

programme.title: Sweet Home Alabama
programme.desc: New York fashion designer Melanie Carmichael suddenly finds herself engaged to the citys most eligible bachelor, but her past holds many secrets, including Jake, the redneck husband she married in high school who refuses to divorce her. Melanie sneaks back home to Alabama to confront her past.

programme.desc: Ross is dating Rachel again but hates what he had to do to get back together, while Phoebe and her real mother, Phoebe Snr, get to know each other better. Meanwhile, Monica is badly stung by a jellyfish and has to resort to drastic measures to relieve the pain.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler and Joey lose all their furniture, Monica finds that one date with her high-school heartthrob is more than enough, and Ross plays tricks on Rachel following their break-up. Elsewhere, Phoebe is temporarily convinced that a cat is the reincarnation of her dead adoptive mother Lily.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler has a brief fling with Rachels boss Joanna which leaves him handcuffed without his trousers in her office. Meanwhile, Joey can only afford one book in an encyclopaedia set, and Monica caters a party for her mother.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Ballroom Dancing
programme.desc: Joey argues with the building superintendent Treegar and ends up having to help him practise ballroom dancing. Meanwhile, Ross and Chandler cant get out of their gym membership even though neither of them wants to exercise, and Phoebe loses her massage job for kissing a client.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With Joeys New Girlfriend
programme.desc: Chandler falls for Joeys new date, Ross discovers that the woman that he thinks hes dating actually thinks hes the babysitter, Rachels new college boyfriend steals, and Phoebe tries to re-catch a cold to improve her singing voice.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Dirty Girl
programme.desc: Phoebe and Monica decide to go into business together after they cater a funeral where the widow tries not to pay, and Ross date with the beautiful Cheryl goes awry when he kills a rat in her filthy apartment.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Chandler Crosses the Line
programme.desc: Chandler finally confesses to his feelings for Kathy just after she splits up with Joey, Ross rediscovers his hopeless musical skills on the keyboard which Phoebe alone appreciates, and Chandler buys new furniture for the apartment since the robbery left them with just the canoe, chick and duck.

programme.title: Sweet Home Alabama
programme.desc: New York fashion designer Melanie Carmichael suddenly finds herself engaged to the citys most eligible bachelor, but her past holds many secrets, including Jake, the redneck husband she married in high school who refuses to divorce her. Melanie sneaks back home to Alabama to confront her past.

programme.title: Iain Stirlings Roast The Internet
programme.sub-title: Joe Thomas, London Hughes and Harriet Kemsley
programme.desc: Iain is joined by Joe Thomas, London Hughes and Harriet Kemsley as they rip into the most cringeworthy corners of the web with killer punchlines.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Actress Lyndia Greenwood and guest comedian Brad Sherwood join the regulars for a series of hilarious games, including Hollywood Director, Duet, Film Dub, Dbbing, Living Scenery, and Scenes from a Hat.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Aisha Tyler hosts this skit comedy show where the actors on the show, usually Wayne Brady, Colin Mochrie, Ryan Stiles and another guest star or two do different comedy skits. Its all improv and made up on the spot.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Host Aisha Tyler joins comic regulars along with special guests comic Gary Anthony Williams and illusionists Penn and Teller as they perform improvised sketches prompted by ideas from the audience.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: The boys confront a group of obnoxious bikers, but their methods force the townsfolk to redefine the meaning of a rather offensive word.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Cartmans vitriol finally gets a platform when he is chosen to be the schools morning announcer, and he unashamedly abuses his position.

programme.title: Dragony Aunts
programme.desc: The girls are joined by a real life Sugababe, Mutya Buena, and help her through quick fire speed dating. They also offer advice to Claudette about online dating for people in their 60s.

programme.title: Michael McIntyre: Live and Laughing
programme.desc: Michael McIntyre, star of his eponymous `BBC1 Comedy Roadshow, performs his own stand-up show in front of a sell-out crowd at the world-famous Hammersmith Apollo. Michael regales the audience with tales of driving, child-rearing and `the man drawer.

programme.title: Dickinsons Real Deal
programme.desc: Oswestry is the location for David Dickinson and his team as David Ford has his work cut out with a young man who has brought in a set of gold sovereigns and Brenda Haller tries her best to buy a Bakelite telephone.

programme.title: Dickinsons Real Deal
programme.desc: Burton-on-Trent in Staffordshire plays host to David Dickinson and his team. Some glamorous calendar girls turn up on Alison Chapmans table, and one of Tim Hogarths favourite type of items turns up.

programme.title: Dickinsons Real Deal
programme.desc: David and his dealers are in St Albas where Ian Towning is wooed by a Brazilian charmer for a retro clock and Karen Dalmeny finds herself losing her patience and cash over a stereoscope.

programme.title: Dickinsons Real Deal
programme.desc: David and dealers Michael Hogben, Brenda Haller, David Tupman and Simon Schneider find bargains hard to find in Oldham, but a mysterious pair of black glass jugs do cause a stir in the room.

programme.title: Overhaulin

programme.title: Gold Rush
programme.desc: The boys are back in Alaska (although Discovery dropped the states mention in the title after the first season) hoping to strike it rich mining for gold. Their first effort was anything but rich and glorious, however, as the crew led by Todd Hoffman and his father, Jack, sunk $250,000 into their dream and came away with just $20,000 worth of gold. The dismal summer was filled with injuries, malfunctioning equipment and constant fighting among the greenhorn miners, yet their serious case of gold fever trumps any talk of giving up and leads to a new operating plan in order to salvage their dream. The series also keeps tabs on the efforts of teenager Parker Schnabel and old-timer Dakota Fred to hit the mother lode at separate sites.

programme.desc: The crew race to finish the monster school bus with a 40-foot drive train and 66-inch tyres that is one of their biggest builds yet. Meanwhile, Redbeard discovers the Mello Yello race car from Days of Thunder.

programme.title: Hoffman Family Gold
programme.desc: Todd Hoffman is ready to get back in the mining game. Hes putting his life savings into an ambitious plan to turn around a distressed mine in Nome, Alaska.

programme.title: Hoffman Family Gold
programme.desc: Todd Hoffman banks his future mining career on turning around a rundown mine 80 miles north of Nome, Alaska, where unforgiving weather, rookie crews and beat up equipment are affecting the mines ability to keep operations going.

programme.title: Overhaulin
programme.desc: John converted his van himself after buying it in 1976. However, it soon became neglected, but Johns daughter is determined to change all that.

programme.title: Overhaulin
programme.desc: When chat show host Jay Leno found out that his friend Dave Killackey and his 1956 Nomad needed help, he called in Chip Foose and the boys.

programme.title: Gold Rush
programme.desc: The boys are back in Alaska (although Discovery dropped the states mention in the title after the first season) hoping to strike it rich mining for gold. Their first effort was anything but rich and glorious, however, as the crew led by Todd Hoffman and his father, Jack, sunk $250,000 into their dream and came away with just $20,000 worth of gold. The dismal summer was filled with injuries, malfunctioning equipment and constant fighting among the greenhorn miners, yet their serious case of gold fever trumps any talk of giving up and leads to a new operating plan in order to salvage their dream. The series also keeps tabs on the efforts of teenager Parker Schnabel and old-timer Dakota Fred to hit the mother lode at separate sites.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The squad head to the annual Cop-Con event, where Captain Holt asks them to be on their best behaviour. Peralta and Diaz search for a missing Santiago.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Santiago vanishes hours before she is due to take her sergeants exam. Peralta and Diaz try to locate her and bring her back before its too late.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: After getting telephone answering machines, Murray and Pop-Pop wage a message war on one another, so Erica, Barry and Pops try to reunite them at a hockey game. Adam finds a lunchtime home with some geeks in the school computer room, but Beverly frets about his social standing.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam gets in trouble with Beverly after he portrays her as a monster while writing a horror story, and Erica forces Barry to attend a costume dance with her.

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: High-flying groom Kev and his ex-paratrooper best man Sam sit down with bride Trish and her best mate Charlene to remember one of the most turbulent weddings in `Dont Tell the Bride history.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire and Phil question whether Haley and Dylan can cope on their own. Pameron has a bone to pick with Mitchell when she gets out of prison.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil and Claire meet Dylans hippy mum, who turns out to have a very interesting past. Then, Cam and Mitch make a discovery in Lilys room.

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: A short, cheeky clip from Rude Tubes naughty little sister, featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorcycle and bicycle variety.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon visits Anna Vincenzos, an Italian restaurant in Boca Raton, Florida. Owner CeCe opened up the restaurant with the help of her father in 2001. Things were going well up until two years ago when the business started to slow down and CeCe is puzzled about what went wrong. Gordon tries to rescue the failing business but is shocked to discover CeCe has lost her way in the kitchen.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon travels to Newbury Park in Southern California to Mexican restaurant Mama Ritas. Owner Laura ran an incredibly successful catering business for years before transferring her skills to running a restaurant, but she has failed to grasp that the two things are very different beasts.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adams girlfriend Jackie returns from her summer in New York but acts like a different person. Beverly is unhappy with Laineys culinary skills.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica thinks her singing dreams have come true when she lands a job at a new karaoke bar in town. Murray teaches Barry and Lainey financial responsibility.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay courts an Instagram celeb as he tries to get a new venture off the ground. Haley and Dylans secret plan to elope doesnt exactly go smoothly.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Cam is finally getting a chance to shine when he is asked to preside over the high school graduation ceremony at the last minute, while Jay gives the commencement address.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon travel to a `high end husband and wife run Bistro in Lighthouse Point, Florida. Stubborn Scottish dictatorial chef and owner Andy has cooked for celebrated chefs in the past, but since opening Le Bistro has lost his passion for cooking and doesnt listen to anyone. With customers grading his food 3/10, and Andy not responding well to criticism, can Gordon get him to listen?

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.sub-title: Handlebar, Casa Roma and The Black Pearl
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay returns to some of the most memorable restaurants in the past to see if theyve implemented positive changes.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake and Holt find the motivation to help Captain C.J. with a big case. Terry imposes a green initiative and tells Gina to remove her precious space heater. Rosa and Boyle visit a foot massage parlour.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When Jake helps Charles track down his sons favourite toy for Christmas, the pair end up facing off against a Latvian crime ring. At the precinct, the team gets ready for the annual caroling contest against its sworn enemy, the MTA.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer suspects Barts new friend Bashir of involvement with a terrorist plot to destroy the Springfield Mall.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When a huge snowdrift engulfs the school, the kids rebel, gagging Principal Skinner, tying him to a chair and running amok. Meanwhile, Homer and Flanders rescue operation is going disastrously, and the fate of Skinner and the kids rests in the paws of a lone hamster.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray and Geoff try to pull Beverly, Barry and Erica out of their shared misery after Laineys departure. Coach Nick returns to town.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly decides the street where the family lives needs another stop sign, and Barry realises hes neglected his college applications.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The Dunphy house is bursting at the seams when Dylans hippie mother moves in and Claires lonely stepdad, Jerry, wants to pay them a visit.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitchell suspects Cameron has an ulterior motive for keeping everyone happy for Christmas dinner. Claire tries to dodge Jays job offer to work at his dog bed company. Luke has to deal with the consequences of kissing Mannys ex-girlfriend Sherri.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Captain Holts mother seeks help from the precinct after her house is burgled, Jeffords, Diaz and Boyle redecorate the breakroom, and Santiago teaches Gina how to change a tyre.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Diaz try to earn the respect of their idol, Lt Melanie Hawkins, after accidentally disrupting one of her undercover cases.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The Simpsons go to Africa after Homer finds a golden prize-winning cracker from the 1960s in the loft, during a food shortage that he started. When Homer enrages a hippo at a Masai party, the holiday soon becomes an adventure.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A day in the lives of Homer, Lisa and Bart, with each of their stories told separately but interrelated. Homers thumb is sliced off when he tries to sneak a brownie from Marge and the journey to Dr Nicks in Rainer Wolfcastles Ferrari is not a simple one. Lisa misses the school bus on the day she was due to enter her grammar robot Linguo in the science fair, and Bart plays with Fat Tonys stash of smuggled fireworks.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A musical comes to life in Springfield as Marge stages a revival of her beloved high school show -- but her wonderful memories are threatened by the return of a rival from the past.

programme.desc: Three rival couples compete in Cambridge, including stable owner Alice and her feisty boyfriend Ollie, who reveals that he helped to hunt and butcher the deer for their main course.

programme.desc: Jimmy Carr with Jon Richardson and Jonathan Ross take on guest captain Lee Mack and Victoria Coren Mitchell, with Jessie Cave in Dictionary Corner.

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: Brothers Adam and Jonny return to Mum and Dads house for a Friday night dinner of soup, chicken and crimble crumble. Dad accidentally invites someone he used to hate round for dinner. How will Dad get rid of him?

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: Its Dads annual hinge oiling evening but when he spills his oil on Mums beloved carpet, its a race against time to clean it up before she finds out. Meanwhile, Jim gets a cat.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers
programme.desc: New addition to the tattoo parlour, Alice, covers a cringe-worthy celebrity crush for booty-shaking Abby, stubborn Jordan needs to lose the ink he got to win an argument, and Sketch has to tackle Adams rather personal tatt.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Ed Gamble gets reckless with a frying pan, Katy Wix asks for a pencil and Jo Brand shares a leisurely sandwich with David Baddiel.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jon Richardson and Joe Lycett take on Sean Lock and Michelle Wolf, while Adam Riches is in Dictionary Corner.

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: The Vitamin Shoppes CEO goes under cover to learn new ways to achieve added growth for her brand, and to experience how her new operational changes and innovations are impacting the front lines.

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Laurent LT Therivel, a Marine veteran who started as CEO of mobile network UScellular less than a year before going under cover, wants to see how his new brand is growing.

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Jackie and Richards evening features some celebrity name-dropping. Theres more bragging than cooking for Ross and Hanne. And Gail and Nigel take a risk: will it pay off?

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: Although it started out cosy at Julie and Robs new home, the house is now not big enough for the couple and their additional children. To sell it, they must correct their poor design choices.

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Former boxing champ Jordan plans a fight-night wedding in front of thousands, while his bride-to-be Danielle has dreams of a girly and intimate day.

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.sub-title: The One with the Zip Wire
programme.desc: Thrill junkie Lee plans an extreme wedding for his unadventurous bride Aimee. Will their wedding have the wow factor, or will it simply crash to the ground?

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Steven J. Cloobeck goes back undercover, this time focusing on properties that Diamond Resorts International acquired from the bankrupted Pacific Monarch Resorts.

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Steve Greenbaum is the co-founder and CEO of PostNet, a company that helps small businesses with everything they need to thrive, from printing and delivery to graphic design. Steve goes undercover in his own organisation.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordons in Redondo Beach, California, to visit Zayna Flaming Grill, a Mediterranean restaurant owned and run by aunt and niece duo Faye and Brenda.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay is back in Redondo Beach, California, for the conclusion of his challenge to save Zayna Flaming Grill from imploding, and he still faces more questions than answers.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: Daniel and Vanessa have outgrown their starter home, and with a baby on the way, they have just two months to find a larger home in the same area.

programme.title: Below Deck Sailing Yacht
programme.sub-title: Man Buns It Has Been Fun
programme.desc: Proud of his teams accomplishments during the final sail, Capt. Glenn believes his tough love made them all stronger; the crew celebrates their final night out and Daisy and Colin try to soak up every moment of it.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: David Baddiel steers some heavy machinery toward a representation of his childhood sweetheart, in the hope of impressing Taskmaster Greg Davies.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts as Sean Lock and Stephen Mangan take on guest captains Richard Ayoade and Katherine Ryan. Bill Bailey is in Dictionary Corner.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jon Richardson and Cariad Lloyd take on guest captains Alan Carr and Kevin Bridges. With Elis James, Jon Robins, Susie Dent and Rachel Riley.

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: Adam has finally been recognised for his musical talent, but its overshadowed when Jonny arrives home and announces hes got married.

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: Adam has been staying at Mum and Dads all week, but with Mum fussing over him so much, hes started behaving like a little boy again. Meanwhile, Jim has passed his driving test - after 15 attempts.

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers
programme.desc: Visitors to the studio include Steve, survivor of a horrific house fire who, after 20 years, wants to cover his scarring with a special Celtic knot design, and Danny, whose portrait of Tupac ended in disaster.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: David Baddiel steers some heavy machinery toward a representation of his childhood sweetheart, in the hope of impressing Taskmaster Greg Davies.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts as Sean Lock and Stephen Mangan take on guest captains Richard Ayoade and Katherine Ryan. Bill Bailey is in Dictionary Corner.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britains sharpest armchair critics return for a new series, sharing their insightful and passionate takes on the weeks biggest and best TV shows.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The squad head to the annual Cop-Con event, where Captain Holt asks them to be on their best behaviour. Peralta and Diaz search for a missing Santiago.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Santiago vanishes hours before she is due to take her sergeants exam. Peralta and Diaz try to locate her and bring her back before its too late.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: After getting telephone answering machines, Murray and Pop-Pop wage a message war on one another, so Erica, Barry and Pops try to reunite them at a hockey game. Adam finds a lunchtime home with some geeks in the school computer room, but Beverly frets about his social standing.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam gets in trouble with Beverly after he portrays her as a monster while writing a horror story, and Erica forces Barry to attend a costume dance with her.

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: High-flying groom Kev and his ex-paratrooper best man Sam sit down with bride Trish and her best mate Charlene to remember one of the most turbulent weddings in `Dont Tell the Bride history.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire and Phil question whether Haley and Dylan can cope on their own. Pameron has a bone to pick with Mitchell when she gets out of prison.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil and Claire meet Dylans hippy mum, who turns out to have a very interesting past. Then, Cam and Mitch make a discovery in Lilys room.

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: A short, cheeky clip from Rude Tubes naughty little sister, featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorcycle and bicycle variety.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon visits Anna Vincenzos, an Italian restaurant in Boca Raton, Florida. Owner CeCe opened up the restaurant with the help of her father in 2001. Things were going well up until two years ago when the business started to slow down and CeCe is puzzled about what went wrong. Gordon tries to rescue the failing business but is shocked to discover CeCe has lost her way in the kitchen.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon travels to Newbury Park in Southern California to Mexican restaurant Mama Ritas. Owner Laura ran an incredibly successful catering business for years before transferring her skills to running a restaurant, but she has failed to grasp that the two things are very different beasts.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adams girlfriend Jackie returns from her summer in New York but acts like a different person. Beverly is unhappy with Laineys culinary skills.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Erica thinks her singing dreams have come true when she lands a job at a new karaoke bar in town. Murray teaches Barry and Lainey financial responsibility.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay courts an Instagram celeb as he tries to get a new venture off the ground. Haley and Dylans secret plan to elope doesnt exactly go smoothly.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Cam is finally getting a chance to shine when he is asked to preside over the high school graduation ceremony at the last minute, while Jay gives the commencement address.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon travel to a `high end husband and wife run Bistro in Lighthouse Point, Florida. Stubborn Scottish dictatorial chef and owner Andy has cooked for celebrated chefs in the past, but since opening Le Bistro has lost his passion for cooking and doesnt listen to anyone. With customers grading his food 3/10, and Andy not responding well to criticism, can Gordon get him to listen?

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.sub-title: Handlebar, Casa Roma and The Black Pearl
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay returns to some of the most memorable restaurants in the past to see if theyve implemented positive changes.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake and Holt find the motivation to help Captain C.J. with a big case. Terry imposes a green initiative and tells Gina to remove her precious space heater. Rosa and Boyle visit a foot massage parlour.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When Jake helps Charles track down his sons favourite toy for Christmas, the pair end up facing off against a Latvian crime ring. At the precinct, the team gets ready for the annual caroling contest against its sworn enemy, the MTA.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer suspects Barts new friend Bashir of involvement with a terrorist plot to destroy the Springfield Mall.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When a huge snowdrift engulfs the school, the kids rebel, gagging Principal Skinner, tying him to a chair and running amok. Meanwhile, Homer and Flanders rescue operation is going disastrously, and the fate of Skinner and the kids rests in the paws of a lone hamster.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray and Geoff try to pull Beverly, Barry and Erica out of their shared misery after Laineys departure. Coach Nick returns to town.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly decides the street where the family lives needs another stop sign, and Barry realises hes neglected his college applications.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The Dunphy house is bursting at the seams when Dylans hippie mother moves in and Claires lonely stepdad, Jerry, wants to pay them a visit.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitchell suspects Cameron has an ulterior motive for keeping everyone happy for Christmas dinner. Claire tries to dodge Jays job offer to work at his dog bed company. Luke has to deal with the consequences of kissing Mannys ex-girlfriend Sherri.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Captain Holts mother seeks help from the precinct after her house is burgled, Jeffords, Diaz and Boyle redecorate the breakroom, and Santiago teaches Gina how to change a tyre.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Diaz try to earn the respect of their idol, Lt Melanie Hawkins, after accidentally disrupting one of her undercover cases.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The Simpsons go to Africa after Homer finds a golden prize-winning cracker from the 1960s in the loft, during a food shortage that he started. When Homer enrages a hippo at a Masai party, the holiday soon becomes an adventure.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A day in the lives of Homer, Lisa and Bart, with each of their stories told separately but interrelated. Homers thumb is sliced off when he tries to sneak a brownie from Marge and the journey to Dr Nicks in Rainer Wolfcastles Ferrari is not a simple one. Lisa misses the school bus on the day she was due to enter her grammar robot Linguo in the science fair, and Bart plays with Fat Tonys stash of smuggled fireworks.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A musical comes to life in Springfield as Marge stages a revival of her beloved high school show -- but her wonderful memories are threatened by the return of a rival from the past.

programme.title: MAFS UK Does Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Fitness fanatic Paul Liba hosts a sports-themed night and challenges his guests to eat their pudding while wearing boxing gloves. Will his menu pack the punch to wow his diners?

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off: Stand Up To Cancer
programme.sub-title: Stacey Dooley, Jade Thirlwall, KSI, Katherine Ryan
programme.desc: Stacey Dooley, Jade Thirlwall, KSI and Katherine Ryan make cocktail-flavoured fondant fancies before creating a showstopping biscuit and meringue scene.

programme.desc: Pansexual sex therapist Mariias after a not-so-average Mr or Mrs whos not too tired for sex. Old romantic at heart Alannah seeks a forever fella who can speak her love language.
