programme.title: Lemony Snickets A Series of Unfortunate Events
programme.desc: Three orphans are sent to live with their uncle Count Olaf, but he only wants their family fortune. What follows is a battle of wits.

programme.title: The Cat in the Hat
programme.desc: Humorous adaptation of the classic Dr Seuss childrens book, in which two housebound children are visited by a cat who saves them from their rainy-day boredom by bringing mayhem to their house.

programme.title: Scooby-Doo 2: Monsters Unleashed
programme.desc: The crime-busting gang, Mystery Inc, and their dopey mutt Scooby-Doo are back, this time investigating the spooky goings-on brought about by an evil genius intent on wreaking havoc in the town of Coolsville.

programme.title: Harold and the Purple Crayon
programme.desc: Inside his book, Harold can make anything come to life simply by drawing it. After he grows up and draws himself off the books pages and into the real world, he learns his trusty crayon can set off more hilarious hijinks than he thought possible.

programme.title: Peter Pan
programme.desc: In stifling Edwardian London, Wendy Darling mesmerises her brothers every night with bedtime tales of swordplay, swashbuckling and the fearsome Captain Hook. However, the children become the heroes of an even greater story, when Peter Pan flies into their nursery one night and leads them over moonlit rooftops through a galaxy of stars and to the lush jungles of Neverland.

programme.title: My Penguin Friend
programme.desc: A heartbroken fisherman finds a penguin drifting alone in the ocean, drenched in oil from a spill. He not only rescues the sea creature, but takes it under his wing, finding a sense of joy for the first time in years.

programme.title: The Tiger Rising
programme.desc: When a boy discovers a caged tiger in the woods near his home, his imagination runs wild as his life begins to change in unexpected ways.

programme.title: Ride On
programme.desc: Washed-up stuntman Luo seeks help from his estranged daughter and her lawyer boyfriend when his beloved stunt horse may be auctioned off to pay his debts. Luo and Red Hare become a media sensation when their fight with debt collectors goes viral.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog 3
programme.desc: Sonic, Knuckles and Tails reunite to battle Shadow, a mysterious new enemy with powers unlike anything theyve faced before. With their abilities outmatched in every way, they seek out an unlikely alliance to stop Shadow and protect the planet.

programme.title: Hook
programme.desc: Grown-up Peter Pan has to return to Neverland to rediscover his true identity in order to rescue his children from the clutches of the evil Captain Hook. Peter has grown up into a workaholic executive but takes time off for a holiday in London. Once there, his children are kidnapped by Hook, and Peter must throw off his corporate image and go back to Neverland to save his children.

programme.title: Cats and Dogs
programme.desc: Unknown to humans, all-out war between cats and dogs has raged since the beginning of time. Now the cats face defeat if scientist Professor Brody can perfect a formula that will make all humans non-allergic to dogs. The cats leader, Mr Tinkles, plans to steal the serum, but first he must get past fearless dog agent Lou who, thanks to a mistake in recruitment, guards the Brody family.

programme.title: Cats and Dogs: The Revenge of Kitty Galore
programme.desc: The canine and feline species join forces to thwart the evil plans of Kitty Galore who dreams of global domination.

programme.title: Mouse Hunt
programme.desc: Slapstick tale which follows the misfortunes of two hard-up brothers whose plans to renovate and sell a valuable building are jeopardised by a rogue mouse. The brothers soon find themselves pulling out all the stops in order to evict their tiny resident.

programme.title: Yogi Bear
programme.desc: Yogi, Boo Boo and Ranger Smith team up to try to stop the mayor from closing Jellystone Park and selling it to loggers.

programme.title: Spy Kids 2: The Island of Lost Dreams
programme.desc: The sequel in which the globetrotting sibling duo attempt to reclaim the powerful Transmooker device from the clutches of a mad scientist. Their quest leads them to his tropical island hideaway, which he shares with an assortment of mutant creatures.

programme.title: Spy Kids 2: The Island of Lost Dreams
programme.desc: The sequel in which the globetrotting sibling duo attempt to reclaim the powerful Transmooker device from the clutches of a mad scientist. Their quest leads them to his tropical island hideaway, which he shares with an assortment of mutant creatures.

programme.title: The Exorcist
programme.desc: A famous actress calls upon medical science for help when her daughter begins behaving strangely, but without any success. Then, as bizarre and horrific incidents involving the daughter increase, her mother turns in desperation to the Church, and to a priest who doubts his own faith.

programme.title: Waterworld
programme.desc: Big-budget tale of the battle for survival in a world where dry land has disappeared with the melting of the polar ice caps. One man, who has become amphibious, tries to protect survivors on an artificial atoll made from scrap metal by taking on a gang of marauding pirates. He is also intent on discovering if there is any truth in the myth that there is still some land left above water.

programme.title: Sixteen Candles
programme.desc: A teen suffers the pain of adolescence as she longs for Mr. Right while fending off the advances of the class clown.

programme.title: Blazing Saddles
programme.desc: Irreverent spoof about a black sheriff hired by a crooked speculator to drive citizens out of an all-white town which lies in the path of a railroad. The townspeople turn on the inexperienced sheriff, and he is forced to turn to a convict, once the fastest gun in the West, for help.

programme.title: In and Out
programme.desc: The entire town is watching with bated breath as one of their own is up for an Oscar. They get more than they bargain for when he outs his high-school English teacher, who then has to prove to everyone, especially his fiancee, that hes straight. The press turn up and one reporter in particular is making life very difficult.

programme.title: Back to the Future
programme.desc: A modern-day teenager is transported back to the 1950s, where he encounters his mother and father in their youth.

programme.title: Back to the Future Part II
programme.desc: Time-travel sequel with Marty McFly and the eccentric inventor Doc Brown travelling back and forth in time to stop their nemesis tampering with history. By stealing the time machine and travelling back in time himself, Biff Tannen gives his younger self a book containing fifty years of sports statistics which he uses to amass an enormous gambling fortune and power.

programme.title: Back to the Future Part III
programme.desc: Marty McFly travels to the American Wild West of 1885 in a desperate bid to save Doc Brown from becoming another victim of a black-hatted gunslinger.

programme.title: Ace Ventura: Pet Detective
programme.desc: Tale about an unconventional sleuths attempts to find a football teams stolen mascot dolphin. The Miami Dolphins are aghast when their beloved Snowflake is abducted one week before the all-important Super Bowl, so they call in Ace Ventura, a private eye who uses unorthodox methods to retrieve missing animals.

programme.title: Ace Ventura: When Nature Calls
programme.desc: Sequel about the zany private detective who specialises in locating missing pets. Ace Ventura travels to Africa to search for a kidnapped sacred albino bat, which reputedly has the power to restore peace between two warring tribes.

programme.title: Shirley Valentine
programme.desc: Shirley is a Liverpudlian housewife stuck in a loveless marriage. One day she finds herself talking to the wall, and decides to make some changes in her life. Flying off to the Greek island of Mykonos on her own, she is gently romanced by middle-aged waiter Costas.

programme.title: Singin in the Rain
programme.desc: When the transition is being made from silent films to `talkies, everyone has trouble adapting. Don and Lina have been cast repeatedly as a romantic couple, but when their latest film is remade into a musical, only Don has the voice for the new singing part. After a lot of practise with a diction coach, Lina still sounds terrible, and Kathy, a bright young aspiring actress, is hired to record over her voice.

programme.desc: A precocious child who hopes to be a writer lands in hot water with her classmates after her secret notebook is stolen.

programme.desc: Perennial family favourite about Dorothy, a young girl from the American Midwest, who is swept by a cyclone to a magical kingdom over the rainbow. There she meets a scarecrow, a tin man and a cowardly lion, who join her on a quest to find the all-powerful Wizard of Oz, the only man who can help her get back to to Kansas. However, the Wicked Witch of the West has other plans for Dorothy and her new friends.

programme.title: A Dogs Purpose
programme.desc: Reincarnated as different dogs over the course of five decades, a lovable and devoted canine keeps reuniting with the original owner who cared for it as a golden retriever puppy.

programme.title: The Wild Robot
programme.desc: Shipwrecked on a deserted island, a robot named Roz must learn to adapt to its new surroundings. Building relationships with the native animals, Roz soon develops a parental bond with an orphaned gosling.

programme.title: Shrek
programme.desc: The story of a reclusive green ogre called Shrek whose life of solitude is disrupted by a horde of refugees who have been banished by the evil Lord Farquaad. Determined to save his home, Shrek cuts a deal with the tyrant, who sets him a daunting task - if Shrek is ever to enjoy peace and quiet again, he must rescue Farquaads bride-to-be from a dangerous castle.

programme.desc: At the urging of the wizard Gandalf, unassuming hobbit Bilbo Baggins joins 13 dwarves on a perilous quest to reclaim the kingdom of Erebor and gains possession of the powerful One Ring.

programme.desc: A deep space transporter crash-lands on a desolate planet circled by three suns. Among the survivors are pilot Carolyn Fry, mystic Abu `Imam al-Walid, cop William J Johns and convicted criminal Richard B Riddick, and their first thoughts are of survival and escape. Then Fry finds out that the planet suffers a total eclipse every 22 years, which is when the hibernating, flesh-eating inhabitants awake and hunt.

programme.title: Jaws
programme.desc: Scary chiller about a coastal community plagued by a killer shark. With the summer tourist season at hand, the mayor is keen to keep the first attack hushed up. programme.title: Close Encounters

programme.title: Close Encounters

programme.sub-title: Triangles in the Forest and High Tide

programme.title: Close Encounters
programme.desc: A silent, orange football shaped object is spotted over Loring Air Force Base in Maine, and a Swedish farmer witnesses a crash into a lake.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: When Tommy and Tallulah agree to babysit the spring chicks while Madame Au Lait tends to Mother Chicks hurt wing, they dont realise that how much of a handful the chicks will be. The twins are also taking part in the town kite display today, but somehow the chicks end up surfing on their kite, high in the sky! The twins must stage an airborne rescue before Chime Time.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Tommy and Tallulah are organising McCogginss pile of interesting junk when a vitally important spring goes missing. They cant chime the time without it! The twins chase the spring all over town as it bounces around causing chaos, eventually ending up attaching Pufferty to his kennel. Every time he tries to go somewhere, the spring pulls him back.

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane
programme.sub-title: The Story of Confuse-Us the Carp
programme.desc: Its a topsy-turvy day as Bao Bao the panda and Horace the hare set off on their morning walk - nothing is as it should be and the two friends cant understand why. Confuse-Us the wise old carp tells them that the ping and the pong are out of balance. The friends set off to try and put things right.

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane
programme.sub-title: The Story of Bao Baos Long Goodbye
programme.desc: Bao Bao the panda and Cassandra the crane are best friends. When Cassandra announces that autumn is almost here and she will soon leave, Bao Bao is upset at her imminent departure and prepares himself for life without her. Bao Bao learns that Cassandra is only leaving for the winter months, and he should make the most of her company while he can.

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane
programme.sub-title: The Story of the Savannah Craze
programme.desc: Doris the duck is fed up of always playing the same old games with her friends. She wants to invent a new and fun game they can all play but her other friends are reluctant to join in. She heads off on her own, and soon the other animals are intrigued by the strange bouncy boingy noises that can be heard across the savannah.

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane
programme.sub-title: The Story of a Long Night in the Jungle
programme.desc: Giggles and Tickles are so excited about their birthday the next day that they vow to stay up all night long so that they dont miss a single moment of it. The other animals on the savannah are tired and soon go to bed. Can the mischievous monkeys find ways to keep themselves awake all night and still enjoy their birthday?

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane
programme.sub-title: The Story of a the Record-Breaking Puffins
programme.desc: Gunnar the gull is encouraging the puffins to break as many records as they can. Their noise is distracting Hercule Moustache, who is busy trying to build a beach sculpture. The puffins do their best not to disturb the walrus.

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane
programme.sub-title: The Story of Ronald and His Boulders
programme.desc: Ronald the rhinos favourite pastime is bashing boulders - but one day he realises there are no more boulders left to bash on the savannah. Ronald sets out to find something else to bash - with almost catastrophic consequences.

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane
programme.sub-title: The Story of the House of Leaves
programme.desc: Nelson the elephant wants to build the biggest and best house of leaves ever. His nephew Nigel is eager to help out, but Nelson is worried that the leaf house might be too fragile for his exuberant young nephew. When the house of leaves comes crashing down, Nelson wastes no time in telling Nigel off.

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane
programme.sub-title: The Story of Gertie the Goat
programme.desc: Gertie the goat has agreed to take Bao Bao the panda on a climbing expedition up the So Hi Mountains. The other animals advise Gertie against the trip, since pandas are not renowned for their climbing skills. Will Gertie and Bao Bao prove the others wrong, or will they need some help from their friends?

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane
programme.sub-title: The Story of the Jungle Ball
programme.desc: The Jungle Ball is imminent and all the animals are busy finding their dance partners for the night. All except Reginald - nobody has ever asked him to dance with them at the Jungle Ball. He sets off in search of a dance partner, but has he left it too late?

programme.title: 64 Zoo Lane

programme.desc: The savannah animals are busy preparing for the great rains, which are due any day. The rains flood the plains every year and they will have to take shelter on Blue Mountain. This year it is Giggles and Tickles turn to keep watch for the start of the rain.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Tommy and Tallulah find harvesting very slow when they volunteer to pick Lopsiloos vegetables. Surely there must be some way to speed it up? programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: The twins are asked to deliver a precious package to Madame Au Lait and decide that a ride with Pufferty is safest way to transport it. programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: Tickety Town is covered in fallen leaves, so Tommy and Tallulah are using McCogginss new prototype street sweeper to clear them. However, in their eagerness to speed things up, they go against his instructions and press the turbo button. Suddenly, the sweeper goes haywire, rampaging through town and sucking up anything in its path, including Madame Au Laits clock key and very nearly Hopparoo too.

programme.title: Tickety Toc
programme.desc: The whole town gathers to take part in McCoggins treasure hunt. Whoever finds the most cogs will be the winner. programme.title: Tickety Toc

programme.title: Tickety Toc

programme.title: Primeval
programme.desc: A mysterious group comes through an anomaly in a theatre, followed by deadly tree creatures. As the group attempts to escape, Matt inadvertently brings back one of them against her will. In a frantic chase through the city, they track the creature down - only to discover that the anomaly has closed.

programme.title: Edwardian Farm
programme.desc: Its June, and archaeologists Alex Langlands and Peter Ginn and historian Ruth Goodman head up to Dartmoor to discover the ways in which Edwardian farmers took advantage of this unique and spectacular landscape to add to their income. programme.title: Garden Rescue
programme.desc: Bindu and Vivek have recently taken on their first garden after years of living in flats. Originally from India, Bindu grew up with a garden full of vegetables, nature and birdsong, and he would like to recreate a bit of that in their modest garden in Warrington. The garden is a sun trap, so theyd like some height and shade in the plot, as well as raised beds for growing fruit and veg.

programme.title: Edwardian Farm
programme.desc: Its July and time to bring in the cherry harvest with the help of Dartmoor pony Laddy. Historian Ruth Goodman tries her hand at salmon netting, while archaeologists Alex Langlands and Peter Ginn try to save their potato crop from being destroyed by blight. Alex goes to an Edwardian school room to recruit a traditional rural source of cheap labour: children. Ruth learns how to make a bathing suit from wool.

programme.title: The Wild Gardener
programme.desc: Colin welcomes the first wild visitors. When rain arrives, the garden is transformed - ponds burst with dragonflies and damselflies, meadows explode in flower and the hum of life is everywhere.

programme.title: The Greatest Auction
programme.desc: A bidding war breaks out over two vintage Hermes handbags. A print by famous street artist Invader goes for 100 times what the seller originally paid for it. And the coolest skateboard in town, designed by Virgil Abloh, goes under the hammer.

programme.title: New Home DIY
programme.desc: After dismantling a dangerous wall, Dave re-uses the original bricks whilst giving master classes in old-English brickwork from the ground up.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May compete in an epic London-to-Edinburgh race, setting out to discover what `Top Gear might have been like 60 years ago. James grabs himself a gorgeous old Jaguar XK120 sports car, while Richard chooses to torture himself on the Vincent Black Shadow motorbike, and Jeremy takes the Tornado, a new steam train built to the blueprints used to create some of Britains finest locomotives.

programme.desc: Dave Myers and Si King explore the amazing food available in our British Waterways. James grabs himself a gorgeous old Jaguar XK120 sports car, while Richard chooses to torture himself on the Vincent Black Shadow motorbike, and Jeremy takes the Tornado, a new steam train built to the blueprints used to create some of Britains finest locomotives.

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Best of British
programme.desc: Dave Myers and Si King explore the amazing food available in our British Waterways. With their unique banter and camaraderie, the duo try their hand at fly fishing for trout, create a sumptuous stuffed wild duck and find out about how the Gloucestershire tradition of eating baby eels has effectively died out.

programme.title: Rick Stein From Venice to Istanbul
programme.desc: In the Byzantine city of Ravenna Rick discovers piadinas, street food dating back to Roman times. He then crosses the Adriatic Sea to Croatia and takes the opportunity to discover new dishes like pasticada, goat stew with peas and lamb peka.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May confront the credit crunch head on as they attempt to find three sensibly priced small cars that wont make you miserable, a process that involves haranguing bankers, harnessing large dogs, and almost getting arrested. Plus, James meets American stunt driving legend Ken Block, and Michael McIntyre is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car.

programme.title: Hairy Bikers Best of British
programme.desc: Dave and Si discover how necessity often forced British cooks to pull out all the stops in an effort to create tasty dishes. In fact some of our favourite meals have been born out of hard times. programme.desc: The rather craggy Kraals unleash their plan to wipe out the human race. Can the Doctor and Sarah thwart them with the help of their old friend Harry Sullivan?

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: Masquerading as research scientist, Professor Thascales, the Master is using a device called TOMTIT to summon an ancient and powerful creature from beyond time. UNIT receive an invitation to observe a demonstration of the TOMTIT.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: The Doctor tracks the Master down to the Newton Institute. There, after a disastrous attempt to summon Kronos, the Master prepares to use TOMTIT again to transmit the Lost Citys high priest through time into his laboratory.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: Krasis, the High Priest of Atlantis, has been summoned by the Master to help him find the crystal of Kronos. The Master uses the TOMTIT machine to summon threats from the past to attack UNIT.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: As UNIT forces approach, the Master leaves for Atlantis in his TARDIS. However, the Doctor is not far behind and in the time vortex, the two Time Lords end up confronting each other.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: Arriving in Atlantis, the Master seduces the beautiful Queen Galleia, so that he might possess the crystal of Kronos. However, it is protected by a guardian who is half man, half beast.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Steam Railway: All Aboard
programme.desc: To celebrate its 50th anniversary, the railway has hired headlining steam engine Royal Scot, but she has a problem with her boiler, carriages that havent been serviced in five years, and no-one even knows if she will fit the line.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A delightful collection of British classics comes up for auction, including an Austin A35 and a Hillman Avenger Estate in stunning condition. An E-Type Jaguar also hits the auction.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Three MGs from the 70s turn up at the garage, still covered in original factory wax. Nobody can believe it, or value them. A Morris 1000 turns up at the auction along with a TR7 V8.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Homeowners across Britain try to complete do-it-yourself home projects on their own. But sometimes, they need help finishing the work. Thats where presenter Nick Knowles and his team of designers and builders step in. They help homeowners complete their DIY projects gone awry.

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Jordan Hutchison is an inspirational teenager. He has cerebral palsy and epilepsy, but this has not stopped him defying expectations and raising huge sums of money for charity. He currently lives with his parents, Jackie and Colin, and his siblings at his grandmothers house. He sleeps on an air bed, while the parents share rooms with the younger children. The family home is a shell after a series of building issues meant the family ran out of money with no way of finishing the work.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Single mother Julie Jones became a national news story when she promised to look after her dying friends children. Overnight Julies family grew from three children to eight. Nick Knowles and the team travel to Huntingdon where, with the help of the local community, they aim to transform Julies house into a home for this supersized family. They have just ten days in which to finish the build.

programme.desc: Building an extension to meet the needs of their growing family seemed a straightforward proposition for Neil and Rebecca Smith, but then Neil was made redundant and the couples youngest child began to display signs of autism. programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Hanna and Mike have three kids, two of them are twins born prematurely. One now suffers from cerebral palsy and the other is profoundly deaf. The family house is tiny and the cramped conditions are making life extremely difficult and at times dangerous for the growing boys. Nick Knowles and DIY SOS team call on friends, family and the local community to come to the aid of this young family and build a single storey extension in just nine days.

programme.desc: Michael McIntyre hosts a gameshow packed with huge stars, big laughs and a colossal spinning wheel. Three contestants hope to answer their way to a fortune, guided by seven celebrity experts. Can the famous faces help them to win life-changing cash?

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo crosses the Culloden Viaduct aboard the Caledonian Sleeper to arrive bright and early in the coastal city of Inverness, from which he heads north on a magnificent scenic adventure to the Orkney archipelago.

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Beginning on the Moray Firth, Michael admires the impressive Cullen viaduct before enjoying a bowl of Cullen skink at a family-run fishmonger of 150 years standing. Heading west along the firth, Michael reaches Forres Station and the seaside village of Findhorn, where he meets members of an eco-community founded in the 1960s. At the Findhorn Foundation, Michael discovers spiritual energy, sacred dancing and a history of very large vegetables.

programme.title: Great Coastal Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillos Scottish coastal railway journey reaches Invergordon on the Cromarty Firth, the third great inlet on the northeast coast of the Highlands.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: 100 motorbikes come in for auction from every era of the 20th century. Also, the team assess a 1965 Vanden Plas Princess with a four litre Rolls Royce engine thats seen better days.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A rusty 1970 Fiat 500 goes under the hammer - Derek reckons its the kind of vehicle that is so iconic that it has to be saved.

programme.title: Rise of the Nazis
programme.desc: In 1930 Germany was a liberal democracy, with elections, parliament and the rule of law. Just four years later, democracy is dead, Germanys leader is a dictator and its government is in the hands of murderers. This is the story of how this happened.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team present from Eltham Palace in south London. Phillip Mould finds two unknown paintings by Diego Rivera, Hilary Kay is delighted to discover a collection of Gerry Anderson puppets, and Ronnie Archer-Morgan finds a well-preserved mammoth tooth.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team are at Erddig in north Wales. Items include a dazzling emerald and diamond ring worn by the owners grandmother on the Titanic, a Welsh love spoon carved in 1859, and an avid fans collection of James Bond props.
